h489f74e6g704ag4571gb163gf7818cfcc221: That coin's worth plenty. Don't let a squid get their tentacles on it.
h65fddcd4g7065g467dg8900g19f2264b5474: You got what you came for. Just go somewhere else.
h01934e69g9c33g437fg9e66g8eecef1cd552: From hellspawn to angry druids... I'm definitely buying my way to Baldur's Gate.
hacf9334dg1861g4c9dg9026gc9e307e91cd0: Would have been breathing my last if your friend hadn't killed that bugbear.
h4c0e1805g1933g42bagb6cbg89a7f7050505: So, thank you. Not a lot of people watching my back these days.
ha9a65df4g68b9g4107ga1e0g628fa50dab51: You have good timing. Never been much of a fighter, so wrestling a bugbear would have gone poorly.
h4cc8e95fg53dbg4347ga0e0g83d1870f0a45: But you're not here for heroics, are you? Avernus' stench is all over your skin.
h7c3ee8b5g3dc1g44cdgb149g7a4594ed7fca: Let me guess: your devil mistress sent you to get her soul coin back. Too bad. I earned it fair and square.
h57608526g86dfg4a51gb797g9dc75762f592: Care to explain why you reek of the Hells?
h2ac7b14bgbe69g4f54gbe46g05705822dd47: You wouldn't believe me if I told you.
h11c8e107g4c4ag4be9g8fb1gae32eba549af: Considering what I've seen? You'd be surprised.
hea197385ge79ag4351g88c4g63ce57c6cebd: But if you're not here for the coin, I'd rather enjoy the quiet. There's not much of it anywhere else.
hcbd52975ge647g41e6g9ac2g5465cb7a200e: A mind flayer abducted me, and its ship went straight to Avernus.
ha69aa817gd328g4c9cg821cg46a38272a89c: And I thought I was doomed. Now I feel sorry for you.
h665edbc3g95d0g47dbga495g61269ea016c1: Here. Take this. It's worth a fortune. But a fortune's not worth much if you're dead. Consider it payment for saving my life.
h768b47dagdafbg440dga4f4gaab59e7259e9: *A soul coin, true to its name, holds a mortal soul inside. It serves in the Nine Hells as very valuable currency.*
h8778a7d5g49bdg4226gb5ffg20d56274babb: It's a soul, wrapped up in a terrible iron package. Don't ask whose, because I don't know.
h68027d24gb859g4a61gb09ag0f58cbf8808a: I hope it brings you better luck than it has me.
hf1e64251g7ff2g4c08ga561g59c50b0b3898: Worthy of a coin, I think, except... someone seems to have picked my pocket. Gods damn it all.
h79c0f290gff3fg4c51gbd09gc588f19309b8: Sure. And my father's the Dark Prince!
he292aa00g08f0g49e9g9f9fg2e838a76e4d2: Look, I appreciate you killing the bugbear, but this coin is all I have. So thank you, but leave me alone.
h96298033g0a9fg481bgb4c0g7bef03da9d48: No, I don't. But that coin of yours is mine.
h120ad9b9gff81g415cga1d2gac7dada564ad: I'm going to be chased all over Faerûn for this damn coin, aren't I?
hf9f1dbf3g804ag47a7ga39agc28815a11261: Fine. Take it as a grudging payment for the rescue. Now leave me in peace.
h7de4cedeg4739g462fgab71g2b2f5d45f88b: And now I've misplaced the cursed thing! You know what? Good riddance.
h95c1771egc1beg4b22g9531g3ca8d57efc04: I think not. Go and strip the bugbear for parts if you're that desperate.
h98529425g2111g446cg906eg17cefb83f895: Since you did... kill him. And I appreciate that part. So thanks.
h8999ba28gb1e2g42fdga2e5gf3c4dacaab3a: I've been to Avernus, but I'm no devil's servant.
h687ac964gc191g47c7ga316gd5b028799e66: But you're not from Elturel, either. I can tell.
h2cf2046dg80aeg4762ga050gef4bfc1b9ca1: That bugbear would have crushed your skull. This is the thanks I get?
h7001d1bagbc31g4a75gaf1cg4021cffbd536: Why thank you, dread slayer of bugbears. You shall live forever in my memory.
hb433cbb0gd950g4957g9d6dg845bfc96b4d2: Now take my regards back to that pouting erinyes and leave me alone.
h982f07f5g7c72g4353g85b2gd469cc1a0d6a: I promise I'm not working for that devil.
h588d1a20gaa8fg45aaga8a0g12fb92256d0b: I'm sure there are other bugbears to kill. Best of luck finding them.
h2d79d57bgc542g440ag9944ge0355b97481b: How about this? You give me the coin. Now.
h2ac55327g3836g4c60gac20g049543ed22f6: You got me. Hand the coin over and I'll be on my way.
h0e461ebcge1acg43f8g9d17g43e52dce5821: That bloody erinyes. Devils just can't stand to lose.
ha3ab22bagb284g443eg8144g0abc0cdcf517: Here. Now go back to the pit that made you.
h1b3721d1gec48g4da7g9db9g7bc0977a7c78: And I... I don't even have the coin anymore. Beshaba take me, just bugger off.
h0104b5ddg9314g4aa9gb7d9g2561cad0673b: My mother's a warlock. Taught me when a fiend's tongue is twisting.
h5ca5550eg885ag428ega637ga9e78e836599: You might be hell-sent, but you're a bad liar.
h911f2708g5694g4220gb5d8gb0ff75963fbc: What's that saying? Honesty late is honesty halved?
h39c8fbbbgccadg4ec6g8cf7gcfc95470f281: So I'll call us even. Let me go back to relaxing away from all the noise down below.
h27908e4agf280g447egbb07g38e2d83a1681: You hand the coin over, or I kill you. How about that?
hba701b15ge948g424ega519g49291d66de95: Considering you turned that bugbear into paste...
hb7c2f2adga9c7g424bg9392g67a6ec4c127a: ... that's a fair trade. Here. Take this soul back to the damned place it came from.
h989db9ebg52b2g4a82g95f6ge6950eb6492c: ...that's a good trade. Except the coin seems to have slipped through a hole in my pocket somewhere. Damn it.
h11b55a5dg1051g46bcg84b3g07d8e18d9d40: I talked an erinyes out of her favourite soul coin without blinking. And you're not half as scary as she was.
h64a1c4f2g9450g45bfgaaa1g64db62dcc9db: So thanks for the rescue, but you're welcome to the bugbear's spoils, not mine.
hf54fe3a7g4090g4164gbeb2g436ea813e10e: Your mother and I have a lot in common.
hb4aeb5bbgfd12g413cga6efg21b7cdea502b: Gods, I hope not. I left home at sixteen for a reason.
ha5dd550ag20d4g4feeg99aegf7fe2ff5bde0: How in the Hells could you know about that?
h8e667bfdgf431g4c5bgad64g3be670ca7ac7: The Blade of Frontiers cavorting with devils? Don't be absurd.
h70bf0047g4a62g4fd9g8f45g9b75202b922a: Quite the title. Means absolutely nothing to me.
